description: stdio bridge for the local Unreal Editor MCP server from FunplayAI/funplay-unreal-mcp.
name: io.github.FunplayAI/funplay-unreal-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional Unreal MCP HTTP endpoint. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8765/.
environmentVariables.name: FUNPLAY_UNREAL_MCP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Compatibility endpoint variable used when FUNPLAY_UNREAL_MCP_URL is not set.
environmentVariables.name: UNREAL_MCP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Unreal MCP local auth token from the Funplay MCP editor menu or Saved/FunplayMCP/funplay_mcp_settings.json.
environmentVariables.name: FUNPLAY_UNREAL_MCP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Compatibility token variable used when FUNPLAY_UNREAL_MCP_TOKEN is not set.
environmentVariables.name: UNREAL_MCP_TOKEN

title: Funplay Unreal MCP
